title: RITES Individual Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
org: Rail India Technical and Economic Service (RITES)
shortInfo: Rail India Technical and Economic Service (RITES) has officially announced the Individual Consultant Recruitment 2026 with 2 openings. The detailed notification was published on 22 May 2026 at the official RITES website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 60 years and hold qualifications such as B.E./B.Tech/B.Sc in Civil/Environmental/Chemical/Public Health Engineering and M.Tech/M.E./M.Sc. in Environmental/Public Health/Structural/Chemical/Sanitary/Water Resource Engineering can now submit their online applications from 22 May 2026 to 12 June 2026. Direct links to download the noti

basic_details.job_title: RITES Individual Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Rail India Technical and Economic Service (RITES)
basic_details.short_information: Rail India Technical and Economic Service (RITES) has officially announced the Individual Consultant Recruitment 2026 with 2 openings. The detailed notification was published on 22 May 2026 at the official RITES website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 60 years and hold qualifications such as B.E./B.Tech/B.Sc in Civil/Environmental/Chemical/Public Health Engineering and M.Tech/M.E./M.Sc. in Environmental/Public Health/Structural/Chemical/Sanitary/Water Resource Engineering can now submit their online applications from 22 May 2026 to 12 June 2026. Direct links to download the noti

qualification.education_qualification: B.E. / B.Tech / B.Sc in Civil / Environmental / Chemical / Public Health Engineering, M.Tech / M.E./M.Sc. in Environmental / Public Health / Structural / Chemical / Sanitary / Water Resource Engineering
qualification.details: Individual Consultant: Used Water Expert: B.E. / B.Tech / B.Sc in Civil / Environmental / Chemical / Public Health Engineering AND M.Tech / M.E./M.Sc. in Environmental / Public Health / Structural / Chemical / Sanitary / Water Resource Engineering. Preference: Candidate holding PhD will be given preference. Individual Consultant: Standard & Specification Expert: B.E. / B.Tech / B.Sc in Civil / Environmental / Chemical / Public Health Engineering AND M.Tech / M.E./M.Sc. in Environmental / Public Health / Structural / Chemical / Sanitary / Water Resource Engineering. Preference: Candidate holding PhD will be given preference.

salary_details.details: Individual Consultant: Used Water Expert: Rs. 1,60,000/- to Rs. 2,00,000/- p.m. based on experience in Sewage / Waste Water Management / Sludge Management Individual Consultant: Standard & Specification Expert: Rs. 1,80,000/- to Rs. 2,00,000/- p.m. based on experience in Standards and Specifications in sewage, wastewater management, sludge management and solid waste management

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the RITES Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 12-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RITES to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the RITES Individual Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the RITES Individual Consultant recruitment is 12th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Individual Consultant post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Individual Consultant positions in RITES.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.E./B.Tech/B.Sc in Civil/Environmental/Chemical/Public Health Engineering and M.Tech/M.E./M.Sc. in relevant engineering fields.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Individual Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for these posts is 60 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Individual Consultant roles?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 1,60,000/- to Rs. 2,00,000/- per month, depending on the specific post and experience.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for RITES recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves Document Scrutiny followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. In which city will the selected candidates be posted?
faq.answer: The posts are located in Gurugram, Haryana.

faq.question: Q9. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is strictly online through the official RITES website.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these Individual Consultant positions?
faq.answer: These are contract-based positions.
